description: Mobius Neural Substrate — MCP server index. Nodes with mesh.mcp.enabled publish here for Cursor and other MCP clients.

servers.description: Civic Ledger API — SQLite-backed attestations, EPICON feed, mesh ingest, integrity-governed MCP tools

usage: Paste cursor_config_all into Cursor mcp.json, or use a single server's cursor_config. Send MCP-Protocol-Version: 2025-03-26 (or 2025-06-18) on each POST.
